title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
The Digital Marketing Specialist is responsible for driving growth through online paid and organic channels, optimising campaigns, analysing data, and scaling high-performing strategies. You will focus on SEO and performance marketing, leveraging paid media channels such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, Tiktok Ads, and other platforms while implementing SEO strategies to meet business goals and objectives.

Working Hours:

Monday - Friday (10am to 7pm)

Key responsibilities include:

  • Plan, execute, and manage performance-driven campaigns across channels like Google Ads, Meta ads, Tiktok ads, and other display networks

  • Set up, monitor, and optimise paid search and social campaigns to maximise performance

  • Collaborate with the design team to develop high-quality, engaging, and conversion-focused creative assets

  • Perform A/B testing on ads, landing pages, and conversion funnels to improve KPIs such as CPL, CPA and ROAS

  • Use tools like Google/Meta Ad Manager, Google Analytics, and other attribution platforms to track performance

  • Manage marketing budgets effectively, allocating spend across channels to maximise ROI

  • Analyse campaign data regularly to identify trends and create performance reports with insights and recommendations for improvement

  • Present campaign performance and strategies to stakeholders, providing actionable recommendations for scaling successful campaigns

  • Manage and maintain the company’s owned media including websites, mobile apps, and email/CRM software

  • Conduct on-page and off-page SEO to improve organic search rankings and drive traffic

  • Perform keyword research, SEO audits, and site optimisations to enhance visibility and lead generation

  • Develop SEO-optimised blog posts and content pages

  • Monitor and analyse SEO performance and stay updated on search engine algorithm updates

  • Conduct research on market trends, audience behaviour, and competitors to refine campaign strategies
     

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field

  • More than 3 years of experience in digital marketing; prior experience in the EdTech/Education industry or agency experience will be an added advantage

  • Proficiency in tools such as Google Ads, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Facebook Ads Manager, and Tiktok Ads

  • Strong understanding of SEM, SEO and social media strategies

  • Excellent communication, analytical, and project management skills

  • Good understanding of the Singapore education landscape is required

  • Strong command of written English

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2017, Geniebook offers Primary and Secondary school students a powerful suite of online learning solutions which includes our signature AI-personalised worksheets (GenieSmart), live classes with our teachers (GenieClass), and our latest online chat function (GenieAsk) - all designed to maximize improvement and the joy of learning.


Geniebook is an EdTech backed by East Ventures Growth, Lightspeed Venture Partners and other prominent angel investors.


We firmly believe that students should have access to a personalized world-class education helping them grow into confident learners and contributors to society. This same belief continues to spur us on at Geniebook to help students to learn smarter, do better with the best of technology and learning pedagogies. Today, Geniebook is a familiar household name with a diverse team serving more than 150,000 users regionally. In addition to our headquarters in Singapore, Geniebook also has a presence in Malaysia, Indonesia, and Vietnam.


If you are an experienced educator, tech wizard, data expert, designer, go-getter, or someone who cares deeply about the future of education, we welcome you to join us in our exciting journey through the paradigm shift in education.
postedCompany.name: GENIEBOOK PTE. LTD.
